name: Snail Fritters / Beignets D'escargots
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the batter: Mix egg yolks with flour and both tablespoons of olive oil until smooth. Gradually add warm water to achieve a creamy consistency. Season with salt and pepper, then cover and set aside.
2. Just before frying, gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites into the batter.
3. Drain the snails and marinate them for 1 hour in olive oil mixed with chopped herbs (parsley, tarragon, chives, and chervil).
4. Drop the snails by handfuls into the batter, then carefully place them one at a time (or two at a time for petits-gris) into hot frying oil.
5. Fry until golden brown, then drain on paper towels.
6. Garnish with fried parsley sprigs before serving.
Cooking time: 8 minutes
Total time: Approximately 1 hour and 35 minutes including marinating.
